title: Mobile Support & Touch Events
summary: Day 5 review identified mobile support as the #1 priority, aligning with the ROADMAP Day 6 plan. The game is currently desktop-only with no touch support. This day adds touch event handlers for gate drag-and-drop and wire drawing, responsive CSS layout for phones and tablets, proper viewport meta tag, and larger touch targets for pins. Secondary: add a brief onboarding tooltip on Level 1.

tasks.description: Add touch event handlers to canvas for gate dragging, wire drawing, and interaction. Map touchstart/touchmove/touchend to equivalent mouse logic. Prevent default to block scroll/zoom during interactions.
acceptance_criteria: Touch-drag gates from toolbox to canvas on mobile
Touch to start wire drawing from a pin
Touch another pin to complete wire
Touch and drag to move placed gates
Long-press on gate/wire to delete (replaces right-click)
No canvas scrolling during interaction

tasks.description: Add touch event handlers to toolbox for gate dragging on mobile
acceptance_criteria: Touch-drag from toolbox gate to canvas places the gate
Drag ghost follows touch position
Gate snaps to grid on drop

tasks.description: Make layout responsive — stack panels vertically on narrow screens, adjust canvas size, ensure truth table and controls remain accessible
acceptance_criteria: On screens < 768px, layout stacks vertically (toolbox on top, canvas middle, info below)
Canvas fills available width
Truth table remains scrollable
All buttons are touch-friendly (min 44px tap target)
Level select grid adjusts to fit narrow screens
Viewport meta tag prevents zoom issues

tasks.description: Add a brief onboarding tooltip on Level 1 — 'Click a pin to start drawing a wire' hint that appears once and can be dismissed
acceptance_criteria: Tooltip appears on Level 1 first load
Shows 'Click a pin to start drawing a wire' (or 'Tap a pin...' on mobile)
Dismissible by clicking/tapping
Only shows once (persisted in localStorage)
Doesn't block gameplay

testing_focus: Touch events work for all interactions
Responsive layout renders correctly on narrow viewport
Canvas resizes properly on orientation change
Onboarding tooltip appears and dismisses correctly
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
